images.caption:
Figure 1:Mastermind learns at the strategy level rather than the trajectory level.
Verified rollouts feed a dual loop:experience looppreserves task-local lessons, whilepolicy looplearns transferable strategies for frozen executors.

Figure 2:Overview of Mastermind’s Dual-loop Framework.
Starting from a task, 1) theCuratoractivates experience and passes it to thePlanner.
2) ThePlanneremits the current best strategy, 3) theExecutorturns that strategy into a PoC rollout, and 4) theVerifiervalidates the PoC, then closes two loops: 5) it updatesCuratorfor the next attempt and 6)  supplies feedback signals to thePlanner.
Repeated iterations refine the strategy until a verified PoC is obtained.
